creator: ellisw@panasas.com
text: Also, as a brief explanation as to why I marked it "Affects Many People," I have been able to reproduce this bug on real hardware and on 10.0 as have my colleagues in our testing of FreeBSD 10.0 and 10.1.  So I am strongly led to believe the only reason Many People aren't seeing it is because of the decision to default to testing with WITNESS + WITNESS_SKIPSPIN.  That doesn't mean this bug isn't affecting each and every one of them, it sure is; it simply may not be causing any major problems yet.
